caption: A person's hands hold and manipulate a basketball trading card against a backdrop featuring a red, black, and white graphic layout. The card, labeled "OBSIDIAN" at the top and "STEVEN ADAMS" at the bottom, features a player image and a blue fabric swatch. The background includes a repeated logo for "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the upper right and lower left sections of the larger layout, smaller inset video feeds show a man with a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with equipment. Across the sequence, the hands move the card, shifting it from a vertical orientation to being tilted, and finally holding a different "MATRIX NO. MM-SA0" card that also identifies "STEVEN ADAMS." A black box labeled "OBSIDIAN" sits on the surface behind the cards.
